temporal_description:
A young man with dark hair, wearing a dark jacket, stands in the center of the frame, looking slightly off-camera with a serious expression. He is in a dimly lit, cluttered room filled with antique-style furniture and objects. The shelves behind him are packed with various items, including what appear to be glassware and other trinkets. The camera is focused on him in a medium shot. In the top right corner, a watermark with the Chinese characters "风行网" is visible. White Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The audio opens with a male voice speaking in a calm, conversational tone, as if making a simple statement. He says, "I was just about to ask you." His voice is steady and even.

The camera cuts to a wider shot, revealing three men in a dark, cluttered space. In the center, a man with platinum blonde hair, dressed in a black suit, points a wand forward with a determined look. To his left, another man in a dark suit also points his wand forward. A third man stands slightly behind them, observing. The room is filled with antique furniture, including a large, ornate mirror and numerous silver bowls and other decorative items scattered on the floor and on shelves. The lighting is low, casting deep shadows. The "风行网" watermark remains in the top right corner. New white Chinese subtitles appear at the bottom of the frame. The camera remains static, capturing the tense standoff between the characters. The same male voice then shifts, becoming firm and accusatory. The pace quickens slightly, and his tone becomes more forceful and demanding as he declares, "You have something of mine." The background is silent, with no music or other sound effects, which emphasizes the gravity and directness of the confrontation in the dialogue.
